points.title: Negombo Beach
points.description: Seven-kilometer stretch of golden sand with swimming, water sports, spectacular sunset viewing, and beachside dining.

points.title: Negombo Fish Market
points.description: One of Sri Lanka's largest fish markets with early morning auctions, fresh seafood trading, and authentic fishing culture.

points.title: St. Mary's Church
points.description: Magnificent neo-classical Catholic church built in 1874 showcasing colonial religious architecture and ornate interior artwork.

points.title: St. Sebastian's Church, Katuwapitiya
points.description: Beautiful Indo-Saracenic church completed in 1936 with annual feast celebrations and stunning architectural details.

points.title: Dutch Fort Ruins
points.description: Historical remains of Dutch colonial fortification built in 1672 demonstrating strategic coastal defense systems.

points.title: Hamilton Canal (Dutch Canal)
points.description: Historic 120-kilometer waterway built during Dutch colonial period for spice transportation and modern fishing access.

points.title: Angurukaramulla Raja Maha Viharaya
points.description: Famous Buddhist temple featuring 60-meter reclining Buddha statue and colorful Jataka tale murals.

points.title: Negombo Lagoon
points.description: Scenic lagoon ecosystem supporting 190+ wildlife species, mangrove forests, and boat safari opportunities.

points.title: Muthurajawela Marsh
points.description: Important wetland sanctuary offering boat safaris, bird watching, and mangrove forest exploration experiences.

points.title: St. Stephen's Church
points.description: Historic Catholic church on Grand Street showcasing Portuguese colonial religious architecture.

points.title: Udayar Thoppuwa Mosque
points.description: Historic mosque built in 1846 representing Muslim heritage and architectural significance in multi-religious Negombo.

points.title: Negombo Lighthouse
points.description: Colonial-era lighthouse providing coastal navigation guidance and panoramic views of the Indian Ocean.

points.title: Kali Amman Temple
points.description: Hindu temple dedicated to Goddess Kali serving the Tamil community with traditional South Indian architecture.

points.title: St. Anne's Church, Kurana
points.description: Beautiful Catholic parish church serving the Kurana community with traditional colonial religious architecture.

points.title: Negombo Town Center
points.description: Bustling commercial district with local markets, shopping areas, restaurants, and authentic Sri Lankan atmosphere.
